steps.speaker: Deepak Reddy
lines: I did control them. I will not pretend otherwise.
Outside these streets, SRMT's world treats monkeys like a joke until it needs their labour.
I built a cruel happiness because I was afraid of a crueler freedom.

steps.speaker: Shrububu
lines: A cage with a smile painted on it is still a cage.
They get to choose what hurts now.

steps.text: Take the banana gun and continue to Berry Barks.
